calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Thong, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court advises Mr. Thong that this matter was set for hearing to ensure that the court had what it required to grant this petition and confirms the changes included in the amended petition.

The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is granted, and the order is signed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Continued To Dec-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
